allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/colorMap/colorSystemMapping.json'\); const codes = Object.values\(d\).map\(v => v.MARD\).filter\(Boolean\); const groups = {}; codes.forEach\(c => { const p = c.match\(/^[A-Z]+/\)[0]; if \(!groups[p]\) groups[p] = []; groups[p].push\(c\); }\); Object.keys\(groups\).sort\(\).forEach\(k => console.log\(k + ': ' + groups[k].length + ' colors'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/colorMap/colorSystemMapping.json'\); const codes = Object.values\(d\).map\(v => v.MARD\).filter\(Boolean\); const groups = {}; codes.forEach\(c => { const p = c.match\(/^[A-Z]+/\)[0]; if \(!groups[p]\) groups[p] = []; groups[p].push\(c\); }\); Object.keys\(groups\).sort\(\).forEach\(k => { console.log\('--- ' + k + ' \(' + groups[k].length + '\) ---'\); console.log\(groups[k].sort\(\).join\(', '\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/colorMap/colorSystemMapping.json'\); const groups = {A:[],B:[],C:[],D:[],E:[],F:[],G:[],H:[],M:[],P:[],R:[],ZG:[]}; Object.entries\(d\).forEach\(\([hex, v]\) => { const c = v.MARD; if\(!c\) return; const p = c.match\(/^[A-Z]+/\)[0]; if\(groups[p]\) groups[p].push\({code:c, hex}\); }\); Object.keys\(groups\).forEach\(k => { console.log\(k + ': ' + groups[k].slice\(0,3\).map\(x=>x.code+' '+x.hex\).join\(', '\) + ' ...'\); }\);")
